summary: Completed frontend testing of dark/light mode toggle and mobile-responsive design. All 7 features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: Dark mode is default on landing page (bg-[#050505] class present, rgb(5, 5, 5) background)
Desktop theme toggle button (data-testid='theme-toggle-btn') switches between dark and light mode
Light mode has proper colors (bg-[#fafafa] background, rgb(24, 24, 27) text color)
Mobile view (390x844) displays hamburger menu (data-testid='mobile-menu-btn') instead of full nav
Desktop nav 'Start Building' button hidden on mobile view
Mobile theme toggle button (data-testid='theme-toggle-mobile-btn') visible and functional
Mobile menu opens and shows 'Start Building' button (data-testid='mobile-start-btn')
CTA section button (data-testid='cta-start-btn') navigates to /builder correctly
Mobile menu CTA (data-testid='mobile-start-btn') navigates to /builder correctly
All 5 feature cards display properly on mobile
How-it-works section with 3 steps displays properly on mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark/light mode toggle and mobile responsive design fully implemented and tested. All data-testid attributes present: theme-toggle-btn (desktop), theme-toggle-mobile-btn (mobile), mobile-menu-btn, mobile-start-btn, hero-start-btn, nav-start-btn, cta-start-btn, learn-more-btn. Theme state is managed via useState with isDark defaulting to true.
